package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorStringBuiltBeforeErrorNeeded() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_error_string_built_before_error_needed"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag error message formatting before the code knows an error will be returned."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
